prompts: From 2020 to 2024, Google's revenue has shown a consistent upward trend, increasing from 181.69 billion USD in 2020 to 348.16 billion USD in 2024. The company's profits also varied significantly, starting at 40.269 billion USD in 2020 and rising to 73.795 billion USD by 2023. However, there was a dip in profits in 2022, down to 59.972 billion USD from 76.033 billion USD in 2021. Overall, while Google's revenue consistently increased, the profit figures showed more fluctuation during the same period.
